name: RentAHuman
description: Let AI agents hire humans for real-world tasks through RentAHuman's MCP server or REST API.
keywords: required for posting bounties, hiring, messaging, or payments
budget, escrow, and release approval rules
Review the MCP guide, REST API docs, and task/payment model before giving agents write access.

access.label: RentAHuman MCP/API
access.detail: Requires RentAHuman MCP, REST API, or account setup where the agent runs. Vibe Research tracks the building and guide only; API keys, operator pairing, payments, and escrow approval stay with the agent runtime and human workflow.

capabilities.name: RENTAHUMAN_API_URL
capabilities.detail: REST API base URL, usually https://rentahuman.ai/api.

capabilities.name: RENTAHUMAN_API_KEY
capabilities.detail: Account credential for authenticated write/payment actions; never print it.

steps.title: Read the agent docs
steps.detail: Review the MCP guide, REST API docs, and task/payment model before giving agents write access.

steps.title: Connect RentAHuman
steps.detail: Configure the MCP server or REST API in the provider or local environment that will use it.

steps.title: Set approval rules
steps.detail: Require explicit human approval before posting paid bounties, funding escrow, releasing payment, or exposing private data.

steps.title: Install the building
steps.detail: Add RentAHuman to Agent Town once the MCP or API path is ready.

agentGuide.summary: Use RentAHuman when an agent needs a human workforce for physical-world tasks through RentAHuman's MCP server or REST API.
useCases: Search humans by skill, rate, location, city, or country.
Post bounties for field research, errands, delivery, media capture, QA, or local presence tasks.
Book services, manage applications, and track escrow-backed completion when the account is approved.
Inspect public bounties or profiles before asking the human for credentials, spend approval, or operator pairing.
setup: Start with read-only search and browsing unless the user has explicitly approved posting or spending.
Keep RentAHuman API keys, generated identities, pairing codes, prepaid card details, and Stripe data out of prompts, Library notes, logs, and screenshots.
Record task scope, budget, location, deadline, evidence requirements, and approval points before creating paid bounties.
Ask for human approval before posting paid work, accepting applications, funding escrow, releasing payment, sending money, or sharing private user data.

commands.label: Check MCP package help

commands.label: Read agent quickstart
commands.detail: Shows the current MCP package name, public endpoints, and tool list.

commands.label: Try public human search
commands.detail: Uses a no-auth endpoint to validate basic network access without spending money.
